case_title: TRAVELFAST INTERNATIONAL INC VS UNTALASCO ED IND DBA UNTALASCO VIDEO AKA UNTALASCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVELFAST INTERNATIONAL INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNTALASCO ED IND DBA UNTALASCO VIDEO AKA UNTALASCO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT UNTALASCO ED IND DBA UNTALASCO VIDEO AKA UNTALASCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRAVELFAST INTERNATIONAL INC AS TO DEFENDANT UNTALASCO ED IND DBA UNTALASCO VIDEO AKA UNTALASCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
